calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:11am
Judge Pro Tem Nancy Newman, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal rehearing, orignally heard by Judge Nancy Newman on Jan-17-07. Respondent William Stamps appears in Pro Per at 9:00am. Appellant Debra Hall appears at 9:11am. Mr. Stamps presents his case in the narrative. Ms. Hall presents her case in the narrative. Both parties are sworn and testify in the narrative.
EXH1(A) green spiral notebook with figures written by Mr. Stamps re the work he did. Notebook was in the possession of the appellant.
EXH2(A) 3 pages of figures and a receipt for the work Mr. Stamps claims he did, and 1 page with a copy of a cancelled check
10:05am
Both parties present closing narratives
10:07am
Matter is submitted. Evidence is retained

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Nancy J. Newman, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
10:10am
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. William E. stamps appears as Pro Per Respondent; no appearance by appellant Debra Hall
Mr. Stamps, having been previously sworn, testifies in the narrative.
10:20am
Matter is submitted, no new evidence is identified or admitted
